title: lithocarpus costatus
intro: Lithocarpus costatus, also known as the Chittagong oak or kauri tree, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus costatus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Lithocarpus costatus, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
